description: Case dimensions: 35 mm x 35 mm Case thickness: 6 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack synthetic strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack coloured dial with branding at the 6 hour mark and brand logo at the 12 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
